perfect.name: Large Digital Kitchen Timer with Loud Alarm
perfect.why: One hour. Visible countdown. Real stakes.

perfect.name: JBL Go 3 Portable Bluetooth Speaker
perfect.why: Mounted on the cabinet handle. Kitchen chaos needs the right energy.

splurge.name: Matching Family Apron Set (4-Pack, Adults + Kids)
splurge.why: The uniform. The whole family is a restaurant for one hour.

splurge.name: America's Test Kitchen Kids Cookbook
splurge.why: The book that made our kids actually want to cook. Takes them seriously.

splurge.name: JBL Clip 4 Portable Bluetooth Speaker
splurge.why: Clip to the cabinet. IP67 waterproof for the splatter zone. Competition needs volume.

splurge.name: Kodak FunSaver 35mm Disposable Camera
splurge.why: Pass it around for the plating shots. Cook-off photos always surprise you.

allages_celebratory.name: Block Party Kit
allages_celebratory.story: Card games, glow accessories, something for the cooler, and music — grab these and the block party runs itself without a single thing to assemble or return.
allages_celebratory.editorial: Codenames works for every age and every group size. The glow sticks are the moment everyone remembers. Best of all: fits in a single tote bag.

budget.name: Codenames Party Game
budget.why: Set it up on a table. People find it. No instruction session required.

budget.name: 300-Piece Glow Party Pack (Bracelets, Necklaces, Rings)
budget.why: Hand them out at dusk. Instant party. Zero setup.

budget.name: Kool Aid Drink Mix Singles 48-count Variety
budget.why: Mix in water bottles for everyone. Endless supply. Keeps the kids hydrated.

budget.name: Anker Soundcore 2 Portable Bluetooth Speaker
budget.why: On before anyone arrives. 24-hour battery. The playlist that runs all afternoon.

perfect.name: Codenames Party Game
perfect.why: The tournament game. Scales to 20 players without any extra equipment.

perfect.name: Confetti Poppers 24-Pack + Glow Bracelet Set
perfect.why: Pop the cannons at the right moment. Hand out the bracelets after dark.

perfect.name: Liquid IV Hydration Multiplier 16-count Variety Pack
perfect.why: For the crowd that's been out in the heat. One packet, one water bottle, done.

perfect.name: JBL Go 3 Portable Bluetooth Speaker
perfect.why: Plenty loud for a gathering. 5-hour battery. No one babysits it.

splurge.name: Ticket to Ride Board Game (2025 Refresh)
splurge.why: The game that runs for three hours at a single table. Everybody wants in.

splurge.name: Confetti Cannon Party Set (6-pack) + Glow Mega Pack
splurge.why: Six cannons plus glow accessories. The two moments everyone talks about later.

splurge.name: Liquid IV Hydration Multiplier 30-count Variety Pack
splurge.why: Enough for the whole block. Throw one in every cooler you've got.

splurge.name: JBL Clip 4 Portable Bluetooth Speaker
splurge.why: Clip it to the table edge. IP67 waterproof. 10 hours at gathering volume.

allages_deep.name: Stargazing Night Kit
allages_deep.story: A star map, something warm to drink, a blanket you can actually lie on, and a camera to capture what you see. Grab these — the sky does the rest.
allages_deep.editorial: You don't need a telescope for your first night. The planisphere teaches you more than an app, and it works without a battery. The thermos is what keeps you outside for hour three.

budget.name: David Chandler Planisphere (40-degree latitude)
budget.why: Set the date and time. It shows exactly what's overhead. The paper version that slows you down in a good way.

budget.name: Bedsure Waterproof Outdoor Blanket
budget.why: Waterproof bottom, fleece top. Lie on it, wrap in it. Clear nights get cold fast.

budget.name: Stanley Classic Trigger-Action Travel Mug (16oz)
budget.why: Hot tea or cocoa at midnight. The thing that keeps you outside for the extra hour.

budget.name: Kodak FunSaver 35mm Disposable Camera
budget.why: Film is the only medium that captures how the sky actually looked. 27 shots.

perfect.name: David Chandler Planisphere (40-degree latitude)
perfect.why: The analog complement to Stellarium. Navigate the sky yourself. No phone required.

perfect.name: Bedsure Waterproof Outdoor Blanket
perfect.why: Big enough for the group. Dry on the bottom. The blanket you always wish you'd brought.

perfect.name: Starbucks Via Ready Brew Instant Coffee (26-count Variety)
perfect.why: Hot coffee at hour two. No machine. Just hot water and the stars.

perfect.name: JBL Go 3 Portable Bluetooth Speaker
perfect.why: Low volume ambient music while you wait for your eyes to dark-adapt. 5-hour battery.

splurge.name: David Chandler Planisphere (40-degree latitude)
splurge.why: Always start with the paper map. You'll remember constellations you navigated yourself.

splurge.name: Packable Down Throw Blanket — Lightweight, Compressible
splurge.why: Packs to the size of a grapefruit. Impossibly warm at midnight. Worth every penny.

splurge.name: Harney & Sons Tea Sampler 50-count
splurge.why: Hot tea changes the experience at hour two when the temperature drops 15 degrees.

splurge.name: JBL Clip 4 Portable Bluetooth Speaker
splurge.why: Clip to the blanket bag. Ambient music that doesn't interrupt the conversation the sky starts.
